# Blooming Marvellous

> Bespoke flowers for the moments that matter — hand-made on the Costa Blanca, delivered free locally.

Blooming Marvellous is a boutique florist run by Lorena in Urbanización Oasis, La Marina (Alicante, Costa Blanca South, Spain). Every arrangement is made by hand for the occasion, with free local delivery and same-day delivery for local orders. The site is available in English, Spanish and German.

## Flowers for all occasions
- Weddings & Events
- Sympathy & Funerals
- Birthdays
- Anniversaries
- Mother's Day & Celebrations
- Everyday Bouquets

## Contact
- WhatsApp: +34 966 84 84 87
- Phone: +34 618 06 39 33
- Email: bloomingmarvellouslamarina@gmail.com
- Address: Calle Virgen de la Asunción, Urbanización Oasis, La Marina, Alicante, Spain
